notes: Implemented direct @triton.jit kernels only; no JAX/Pallas wrapper and no mixed precision.
Runner creates an isolated data/scratch/m2-triton-venv environment and records pip freeze.
Nsight Compute is invoked when present; expected permission failures are captured as profiler artifacts.
Attempt 2 fixed the reviewer-rejected max-over-cached-cubins resource parser by matching cuobjdump output to each kernel symbol.
